text:
There once was a curious cat who loved fishing. Every evening she would slip away to the local pond, hidden behind a tall bush. She'd cast her line with a flick of her paw. After hours of sitting motionless, she'd wade through the reeds trailing a plump little fish. She'd bring it back to her home, nibble on it, and imagine herself the world's finest angler.

One day, while exploring further than usual, she discovered a group of fishermen lurking by a tall pine. To her horror, they were catching fish out of the water! Her heart sank. She retreated to her hiding place. But she couldn't let this injustice go unnoticed. Gathering all her courage, she crept closer. They seemed blissfully unaware.

Taking careful aim, she darted out her fishing line. She caught a bright rainbow trout! Relief washed over her. As she reveled in her successful casting, a fisherman noticed her. He looked surprised.
